Home Products Why Us FAQ

Transform Your Garden

Premium plants, tools, and landscaping supplies for outdoor enthusiasts. Create your perfect green space today.

Premium Garden Collection

Featured Products

Handpicked selections for every gardening need

Organic Plant Starter Kit

Complete set with seeds, soil, pots, and fertilizer for beginners

$49.99 Popular

Professional Tool Set

12-piece stainless steel gardening tool kit with ergonomic handles

$89.99 Best Seller

Smart Irrigation System

WiFi-enabled automatic watering system for up to 8 zones

$199.99 Premium

Shop by Category

Plants & Seeds

Pots & Planters

Soil & Nutrients

Outdoor Furniture

Why Choose GreenScape

Premium Quality

All products tested and verified by expert gardeners for durability and performance

Free Shipping

Complimentary delivery on orders over $75. Fast and reliable shipping nationwide

Expert Support

24/7 customer service with gardening tips and product recommendations

Limited Time Offer

Spring Garden Sale

Up to 40% off on select plants and outdoor furniture

Frequently Asked Questions

Each plant comes with detailed care instructions. Generally, ensure adequate sunlight (6-8 hours), water when soil is dry, and maintain room temperature between 65-75°F. Our expert team is available 24/7 for guidance.

We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all products. If you're not satisfied, simply return the item in its original condition for a full refund. We also cover return shipping on defective items.

Yes! Orders of 10+ items qualify for special bulk pricing. Contact our sales team for custom quotes on large orders. We also have a landscaping division for commercial projects.
